/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,1/X:PAROLEE WAIVES PROBABLE CAUSE AND EVIDENTIARY HEARING,/3000REV/X:PAROLEE ADMITS VIOLATION OF BATTERY ON FIANCEE/X:PAROLEE SHALL BE REMANDED TO THE CUSTODY OF THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION AND THE JURISDICTION OF THE BOARD OF PAROLE HEARINGS FOR THE PURPOSE OF FUTURE PAROLE CONSIDERATION,/
